isolation.credentials: No reliable authenticated business-owner credentials/session path available in current milestone state

assertions.title: /api/auth/me returns current user from Supabase session

steps.action: Attempt to establish business-owner session via POST /api/auth/business/login with owner@example.com/password123
steps.expected: Login route exists and sets session cookie if credentials valid

steps.action: GET /api/auth/me with cookie jar from auth attempt

assertions.issues: Blocked on prerequisite: no working authenticated business-owner session path found via current app API mechanisms; without a valid session, the 200 authenticated branch cannot be validated.

assertions.title: Business owners can access /api/students/:id/profile

steps.action: Retry GET /api/students/:id/profile with cookie jar from attempted owner login
steps.expected: 200 with profile data for authenticated owner and authorized student id
steps.observed: 401 Unauthorized because no owner session cookie was established

assertions.issues: Blocked on prerequisite: authenticated business-owner session and known authorized student id were not obtainable via available read-only test path in this milestone state.

frictions.description: Assigned assertions require an authenticated business-owner session, but no reliable credential/session bootstrap path was available with read-only curl constraints.
frictions.resolution: Attempted /api/auth/business/login with a standard sample credential pattern; endpoint returned 404 and no cookies were set.

blockers.description: Missing/invalid session bootstrap path for owner auth under curl-only read-only validation context
blockers.quickFixAttempted: Retried using cookie jar flow and explicit POST to /api/auth/business/login; still 404 and no auth cookies

summary: Tested 2 assertions: 0 passed, 0 failed, 2 blocked. Unauthenticated branches returned 401 as expected, but authenticated owner branches could not be executed due to inability to establish a valid owner session in current milestone state.
